item.title: First reading, referred to Consumer Protection & Business.
item.description: First reading, referred to Consumer Protection & Business.
item.guid: 2026-01-22/First reading, referred to Consumer Protection & Business.

item.title: 👍Jon DeVaney - Washington State Tree Fruit Association
item.description: Jon DeVaney signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Washington State Tree Fruit Association.

item.title: 👍💵Mark Streuli - WA Potato and Onion Association, WA Wheat Growers, WA Cattlemen Assoc
item.description: Mark Streuli signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent WA Potato and Onion Association, WA Wheat Growers, WA Cattlemen Assoc. They are a registered lobbyist.

item.title: 👍Jay Gordon - Washington State Dairy Federation
item.description: Jay Gordon signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Washington State Dairy Federation.

item.title: 👍Jonathan Quigley - Organic Orchards, Inc.
item.description: Jonathan Quigley signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Organic Orchards, Inc..

item.title: 👍Sue Lani Madsen - Washington Rural Environmental Network
item.description: Sue Lani Madsen signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Washington Rural Environmental Network.
